'''ây-v-z-sh''' ('''kayavzeshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lofe|lofe]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-v-z-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lofe|lofe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-v-z-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kayavzeshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyavzeshoko|thiyavzeshoko]] || [[word:jiyavzeshoko|jiyavzeshoko]] || [[word:shiyavzeshoko|shiyavzeshoko]] || [[word:kiyavzeshoko|kiyavzeshoko]]
